title: Product Steering Document - Vision & Goals
response:
Feedback Summary (1 comments):

General Comments:
1. Regarding `Real-time Updates: Server-sent events for live status updates without page refresh`, server-sent events are not required. Frontend can use TanStack React Query to fetch data with setting 5 minutes as data stale time.

comments.comment: Regarding `Real-time Updates: Server-sent events for live status updates without page refresh`, server-sent events are not required. Frontend can use TanStack React Query to fetch data with setting 5 minutes as data stale time.
